accepted.reason: Sparse graph diffusion kernel with iterative propagation loops and clear optimization signal.
Compact reverse recurrence with numeric stability motivation and tight loop structure.
Sparse coordinate-update logic over segmented indices; good Cython conversion pattern.
DP-style ANOVA kernels with nested loops and coordinate-wise gradient recurrences.
Integer-heavy iterative kernel with strided search decomposition; standalone and optimization-friendly.

skipped.reason: Large domain-specific trigger simulation class; too coupled and broad for current GRPO kernel set.
Rendering engine shader bindings and GL object plumbing, not a pure compute kernel target.
Legacy CPython/BLAS pointer coupling and external library internals reduce portability for dataset use.
Chess engine search tightly coupled to custom classes and movegen APIs.
USB/screenshot I/O tooling and device interaction code; not suitable as Cython optimization training kernel.
